channel.title: The Cambridge Record — broadband
channel.description: Everything on the record about broadband.

item.title: CMA 2026-138 — A communication transmitted from Yi-An Huang, City Manager, relative to an update on the city's digital equity work.
item.description: A communication transmitted from Yi-An Huang, City Manager, relative to an update on the city's digital equity work.

item.title: POR 2026-69 — That the City Manager is requested to work with relevant departments to review the current legal landscape and provide r
item.description: That the City Manager is requested to work with relevant departments to review the current legal landscape and provide recommendations for how to regulate construction of large data centers in Cambridge.

item.title: POR 2026-08 — That the City Manager ask the appropriate departments to review the city’s digital equity work to date, including the st
item.description: That the City Manager ask the appropriate departments to review the city’s digital equity work to date, including the study’s recommendations and all steps taken since the study conclusion in order to update the evaluation of existing internet access programs, assessing whether residents’ digital ne

item.description: A communication transmitted from Yi-An Huang, City Manager, relative to Awaiting Report Item Number 25-8, regarding a request to create a plan with a schedule and milestones to move forward with the creation of a Municipal Broadband Network and present it for consideration by the Council at a Financ

item.title: COM 789 #2025 — , regarding Strongly support ending exclusionary zoning & municipal broadband and in support of PO#1 and PO#4 to improv
item.description: , regarding Strongly support ending exclusionary zoning & municipal broadband and in support of PO#1 and PO#4 to improve safety for children riding school buses_ pedestrians_ and cyclists

item.title: AR-25-8 — The City Manager is requested to create a plan with a schedule and milestones to move forward with the creation of a Mun
item.description: The City Manager is requested to create a plan with a schedule and milestones to move forward with the creation of a Municipal Broadband Network and present it for consideration by the Council at a Finance Committee meeting in the context of capital projects for coming years

item.title: POR 2025 #13 — That the City Manager is requested to create a plan with a schedule and milestones to move forward with the creation of
item.description: That the City Manager is requested to create a plan with a schedule and milestones to move forward with the creation of a Municipal Broadband Network and present it for consideration by the Council at a Finance Committee meeting in the context of capital projects for coming years

item.title: CMA 2023 #307 — A communication transmitted from Yi-An Huang, City Manager, relative to Awaiting Report Item Number 23-82, regarding an
item.description: A communication transmitted from Yi-An Huang, City Manager, relative to Awaiting Report Item Number 23-82, regarding an update on Municipal Broadband and Digital Equity

item.title: AR-23-82 — Report on an update on Municipal Broadband and Digital Equity by December 2023
item.description: Report on an update on Municipal Broadband and Digital Equity by December 2023

item.title: POR 2023 #193 — That the City Manager is requested to work with relevant departments and the consultant team and deliver an update on Mu
item.description: That the City Manager is requested to work with relevant departments and the consultant team and deliver an update on Municipal Broadband and Digital Equity by December 2023

item.title: CMA 2023 #85 — A communication transmitted from Yi-An Huang, City Manager, relative to the final report for the City’s comprehensive ye
item.description: A communication transmitted from Yi-An Huang, City Manager, relative to the final report for the City’s comprehensive year-long municipal broadband feasibility study

item.title: POR 2023 #41 — That a Roundtable be held on Monday, March 13, 2023, from 5:30 p.m. to 7:30 p.m. in the Sullivan Chamber in place of the
item.description: That a Roundtable be held on Monday, March 13, 2023, from 5:30 p.m. to 7:30 p.m. in the Sullivan Chamber in place of the Regular City Council Meeting, for the purpose of receiving an update on the Municipal Broadband Feasibility Study

item.title: POR 2022 #281 — That the Mayor schedule a Roundtable meeting on Municipal Broadband
item.description: That the Mayor schedule a Roundtable meeting on Municipal Broadband

item.title: CMA 2021 #249 — A communication transmitted from Louis A. DePasquale, City Manager, relative to Awaiting Report Item Numbers 21-37 and 2
item.description: A communication transmitted from Louis A. DePasquale, City Manager, relative to Awaiting Report Item Numbers 21-37 and 21-38, regarding digital equity

item.title: COM 260 #2021 — Sundry communications were received, regarding Municipal Broadband
item.description: Sundry communications were received, regarding Municipal Broadband

item.title: CMA 2020 #158 — A communication transmitted from Louis A. DePasquale, City Manager, relative to Awaiting Report Item Number 19-127, rega
item.description: A communication transmitted from Louis A. DePasquale, City Manager, relative to Awaiting Report Item Number 19-127, regarding public utilities' load forecasting and infrastructure planning

item.title: CMA 2020 #133 — Transmitting Communication from Louis A. DePasquale, City Manager, relative to the appropriation of $50,000.00 from Fre
item.description: Transmitting Communication from Louis A. DePasquale, City Manager, relative to the appropriation of $50,000.00 from Free Cash to the Grant Fund Executive Other Ordinary Maintenance account which will be used to support the City’s digital equity efforts to support qualifying families during the COVI

item.title: POR 2020 #113 — That the City Manager is requested to provide an immediate update to the Council on the digital equity research initiati
item.description: That the City Manager is requested to provide an immediate update to the Council on the digital equity research initiative and advisory board, and on efforts to ensure reliable access to the internet citywide

item.title: COM 286 #2020 — Sundry communications were received in support of Municipal Broadband
item.description: Sundry communications were received in support of Municipal Broadband

item.title: POR 2020 #69 — That the City Manager explore short-term solutions to expand essential internet access to Cambridge residents who lack i
item.description: That the City Manager explore short-term solutions to expand essential internet access to Cambridge residents who lack it during the pandemic until such time that a municipal broadband network can be implemented

item.title: AR-20-19 — Report on producing a Request For Proposal for the municipal broadband feasibility study that was called for by the City
item.description: Report on producing a Request For Proposal for the municipal broadband feasibility study that was called for by the City's Broadband Task Force in August 2016

item.description: That the City Manager is requested to produce a Request For Proposal for the municipal broadband feasibility study that was called for by the City's Broadband Task Force in August 2016

item.description: A communication transmitted from Louis A. DePasquale, City Manager, relative to Awaiting Report Item Number 19-60, regarding a report on adding a cybercrime assessment section to the list of monthly BridgeStat reports

item.description: Transmitting Communication from Louis A. DePasquale, City Manager, relative to the appropriation and authorization to borrow $800,000 to provide funds for various Schools for repairs to entrance doors, upgrade of energy management software, replacement of analog phone system with the voice over inte

item.description: Report on how the City views internet-based platforms as opportunities for outreach and communication and what sort of guidelines have been, or are being, developed to help everyone understand how the City’s various departments do or do not utilize these communication resources and how any communica

item.description: That the City Manager is requested to report to the City Council with an explanation of how the City views internet-based platforms as opportunities for outreach and communication and what sort of guidelines have been, or are being, developed to help everyone understand how the City’s various depart

item.title: COM 397 #2018 — Communication received Carol O’Hare, 172 Magazine Street, relating to Policy Order # 1 regarding the proposed Outdoor Li
item.description: Communication received Carol O’Hare, 172 Magazine Street, relating to Policy Order # 1 regarding the proposed Outdoor Lighting Ordinance

item.title: POR 2018 #135 — That the City Manager is requested to develop a plan to achieve the above policy goals as it relates to the digital divi
item.description: That the City Manager is requested to develop a plan to achieve the above policy goals as it relates to the digital divide

item.title: COM 376 #2018 — Communication from Nancy Ryan, 4 Ashburton Place, regarding the urgent need to address the digital divide as it relates
item.description: Communication from Nancy Ryan, 4 Ashburton Place, regarding the urgent need to address the digital divide as it relates to reliable, affordable high-speed internet for all households in Cambridge

item.title: AR-18-27 — Report on why there continues to be significant audio and video difficulties during live internet broadcasts of City Cou
item.description: Report on why there continues to be significant audio and video difficulties during live internet broadcasts of City Council meetings

item.title: POR 2018 #39 — That the City Manager is requested to consult with the appropriate City personnel to determine why there continues to be
item.description: That the City Manager is requested to consult with the appropriate City personnel to determine why there continues to be significant audio and video difficulties during live internet broadcasts of City Council meetings, how these difficulties can be resolved

item.title: POR 2018 #38 — That the City Manager is requested to report on progress and efforts made to date to provide greater access to internet
item.description: That the City Manager is requested to report on progress and efforts made to date to provide greater access to internet services citywide for low income residents

item.title: COM 127 #2018 — Sundry e-mails received in support of Policy Order #7 regarding municipal broadband
item.description: Sundry e-mails received in support of Policy Order #7 regarding municipal broadband

item.title: AR-17-70 — Report on the status of the City’s plans to review and possibly implement a municipal Broadband system. On a communicat
item.description: Report on the status of the City’s plans to review and possibly implement a municipal Broadband system. On a communication from Councillor Kelley requesting that this matter be forwarded to the 2018-2019 Legislative Session

item.title: AR-17-73 — Report on the Municipal Broadband Task Force being reconstituted and on successful cost-effective procurement for phase
item.description: Report on the Municipal Broadband Task Force being reconstituted and on successful cost-effective procurement for phase II by the end of calendar year

item.title: POR 2017 #200 — That the City Manager confer with relevant City departments and report back to the City Council on the status of the Cit
item.description: That the City Manager confer with relevant City departments and report back to the City Council on the status of the City’s plans to review and possibly implement a municipal Broadband system

item.title: POR 2017 #203 — That the Municipal Broadband Task Force be reconstituted and that the City Manager is requested to report back on succes
item.description: That the Municipal Broadband Task Force be reconstituted and that the City Manager is requested to report back on successful cost-effective procurement for phase II by the end of calendar year

item.title: POR 2017 #105 — That the Public Safety Committee begin a public discussion of potential methods of regulating an internet-based delivery
item.description: That the Public Safety Committee begin a public discussion of potential methods of regulating an internet-based delivery system that makes any part of any road a possible loading platform in a way that allows such uses to continue without putting other users of Cambridge’s roads in danger or unreaso

item.description: That the City Manager is requested to confer with the Community Development Department, the Department of Public Works (DPW) and any other relevant City department and report back to the City Council on ways the City can help small businesses offset other costs, included but not limited to, the poss

item.description: A communication transmitted from Richard C. Rossi, City Manager, relative to the Broadband Task Force recommendations and Tilson Report

item.description: A communication transmitted from Richard C. Rossi, City Manager, relative to Awaiting Report Item Number 16-41, regarding what measures can be taken to address the inadequate cell reception of the residents living at 303 Third Street

item.title: POR 2016 #64 — That the City Manager is requested to confer with appropriate City and Cambridge Public School staff to determine the st
item.description: That the City Manager is requested to confer with appropriate City and Cambridge Public School staff to determine the status of the response action review by principals and leaders as it relates to internet threats of bomb or gun violence and that this issue be referred to a joint School Committee a
